meaning: 1. to put effort into sth; 2. to try really hard
sentence: 他着力改善了团队的沟通方式。
pinyin: Tā zhuólì gǎishànle tuánduì de gōutōng fāngshì.
english: He put real effort into improving the way the team communicates.

meaning: 1. (economics) to reduce; 2. to curtail; 3. to cut back; 4. to tighten
sentence: 公司今年开始紧缩开支，减少了不少项目。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián kāishǐ jǐnsuō kāizhī, jiǎnshǎo le bù shǎo xiàngmù.
english: The company started cutting back on expenses this year and reduced quite a few projects.

meaning: 1. places of historic interest; 2. historical sites; 3. CL:個|个[gè]
sentence: 西安有很多著名的古迹。
pinyin: Xī'ān yǒu hěn duō zhùmíng de gǔjì.
english: Xi'an has many famous historical sites.

sentence: 过年时家家户户贴年画。
pinyin: Guònián shí jiājiā hùhù tiē niánhuà.
english: Every household puts up New Year pictures during the Spring Festival.

meaning: to go and visit in an official capacity or for investigation
sentence: 市长出访期间由副市长主持工作。
pinyin: Shì zhǎng chū fǎng qī jiān yóu fù shì zhǎng zhǔ chí gōng zuò.
english: While the mayor is away on an official visit, the deputy mayor takes charge.
